regime_fall.current_status: Operation Epic Fury decimated Iranian military capabilities with 13,000+ targets struck across 38 days, destroying ~90% of weapons factories and ~80% of the nuclear industrial base, forcing Iran into a fragile ceasefire now deteriorating over Strait of Hormuz closure and conflicting interpretations of ceasefire terms. The regime faces simultaneous pressures from US threats to resume strikes, economic shocks from oil price volatility, regional isolation as Israel pursues separate Lebanon deals, and compounding military weakening.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Operation Epic Fury campaign concluded with 10,000+ missions flown, 13,000+ targets struck, 1,700 air defense interceptions, and catastrophic damage to Iranian weapons production, nuclear facilities, and naval capabilities, forcing Iran to accept ceasefire under overwhelming military pressure.
